chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Rev. Appln No.307 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection at flag A. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of MA No.17926/2025. 02.01.2026 Mr. Musharraf Azhar, Special Prosecutor ANF. ------------------------------------ The Special Prosecutor ANF states that during the pendency of the present revision application the trial Court has passed the judgment dated 09.12.2025 and acquitted the respondents accused before the trial Court. In view of the above, the present revision application has become infructuous and the same is dismissed having become infructuous alongwith the listed application. The Special Prosecutor ANF is at liberty to take such ground alongwith main appeal. J U D G E Asif
